title: calophyllum lankaensis
intro: Calophyllum lankaensis, also known as the Ceylon or Sri Lankan canarium, is a tree species native to Sri Lanka. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. The health benefits of Calophyllum lankaensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support cardiovascular health. Calophyllum lankaensis is often prepared as an herbal tea, oil, or powder, which can be used to make medicines for various health conditions.
